---
title: "Bo_Bichette_BIP_2023"
author: "Rayyan Haider"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}
# Load libraries
library(baseballr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(httr)
```

```{r}
# Bo Bichette MLBAM ID
bo_id <- 666182

# Direct Baseball Savant CSV URL for Bo Bichette 2023 batting Statcast data
url <- paste0(
  "https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/statcast_search/csv?",
  "all=true&hfPT=&hfAB=&hfBBT=&hfPR=&hfZ=&stadium=&hfBBL=&hfNewZones=&",
  "hfGT=R%7CPO%7CS%7C&hfC=&hfSea=2023%7C&hfSit=&hfOuts=&opponent=&",
  "pitcher_throws=&batter_stands=&hfSA=&player_type=batter&hfInfield=&",
  "team=&position=&hfOutfield=&hfRO=&home_road=&",
  "batters_lookup%5B%5D=", bo_id,
  "&game_date_gt=2023-03-30&game_date_lt=2023-10-01&hfFlag=&hfPull=&",
  "metric_1=&hfInn=&min_pitches=0&min_results=0&group_by=name&",
  "sort_col=pitches&player_event_sort=h_launch_speed&sort_order=desc&",
  "min_abs=0&type=details"
)

# Download to a temporary file
tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
GET(url, write_disk(tmp, overwrite = TRUE))

# Read CSV directly
bo_raw <- read_csv(tmp, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Keep only balls in play with valid spray coordinates
bo_bip <- bo_raw %>%
  filter(type == "X", !is.na(hc_x), !is.na(hc_y)) %>%
  select(
    player_name,
    game_date,
    events,
    stand,
    batter,
    pitcher,
    hc_x,
    hc_y,
    launch_speed,
    launch_angle,
    hit_distance_sc
  )

# Save cleaned file
write_csv(bo_bip, "bo_bichette_2023_bip.csv")

# Preview
print(head(bo_bip))
print(nrow(bo_bip))
```

```{r Spray_chart_no_diamond}
library(ggplot2)
bo_bip <- read_csv("bo_bichette_2023_bip.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

ggplot(bo_bip, aes(x = hc_x, y = -hc_y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  coord_fixed() +
  xlim(0, 500) +
  ylim(-275, 0) +
  labs(
    title = "Bo Bichette 2023 Spray Chart",
    x = "Statcast x-coordinate",
    y = "Statcast y-coordinate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
bo_plot <- bo_bip %>%
  filter(!is.na(hc_x), !is.na(hc_y)) %>%
  mutate(
    spray_x = hc_x - 125,
    spray_y = 200 - hc_y,
    result_class = case_when(
      events %in% c("single") ~ "Single",
      events %in% c("double") ~ "Double",
      events %in% c("triple") ~ "Triple",
      events %in% c("home_run") ~ "Home Run",
      events %in% c("field_out", "force_out", "grounded_into_double_play",
                    "double_play", "triple_play", "fielders_choice_out",
                    "sac_fly", "sac_bunt", "other_out") ~ "Out",
      events %in% c("field_error") ~ "Error",
      is.na(events) ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# Field geometry
foul_lines <- data.frame(
  x = c(0, -150, 0, 150),
  y = c(0, 150, 0, 150),
  grp = c("L", "L", "R", "R")
)

theta_in <- seq(pi/4, 3*pi/4, length.out = 200)
infield_arc <- data.frame(
  x = 95 * cos(theta_in),
  y = 95 * sin(theta_in)
)

theta_out <- seq(pi/4, 3*pi/4, length.out = 300)
outfield_arc <- data.frame(
  x = 220 * cos(theta_out),
  y = 220 * sin(theta_out)
)

bases <- data.frame(
  x = c(63.64, 0, -63.64),
  y = c(63.64, 127.28, 63.64)
)

mound <- data.frame(
  x = 0,
  y = 60.5
)

home_plate <- data.frame(
  x = c(-8, -8, 0, 8, 8, -8),
  y = c(0, 8, 14, 8, 0, 0)
)

ggplot() +
  geom_path(data = outfield_arc, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_path(data = infield_arc, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = subset(foul_lines, grp == "L"), aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = subset(foul_lines, grp == "R"), aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_path(data = home_plate, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = bases, aes(x = x, y = y), size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(data = mound, aes(x = x, y = y), size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(
    data = bo_plot,
    aes(x = spray_x, y = spray_y, color = result_class),
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 2.2
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  xlim(-160, 160) +
  ylim(0, 230) +
  labs(
    title = "Bo Bichette 2023 Spray Chart",
    subtitle = "Balls in play classified by result",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    color = "Result"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )
```

```{r Bo_Bichette_KDE}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot() +
  # density layer first
  stat_density_2d(
    data = bo_plot,
    aes(x = spray_x, y = spray_y, fill = after_stat(level), alpha = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "polygon",
    contour = TRUE
  ) +
  
  # field geometry
  geom_path(data = outfield_arc, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_path(data = infield_arc, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_line(data = subset(foul_lines, grp == "L"), aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_line(data = subset(foul_lines, grp == "R"), aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_path(data = home_plate, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = bases, aes(x = x, y = y), size = 2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(data = mound, aes(x = x, y = y), size = 2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # optional: add actual BIP points faintly on top
  geom_point(
    data = bo_plot,
    aes(x = spray_x, y = spray_y),
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.25,
    size = 1.2
  ) +
  
  coord_fixed() +
  xlim(-160, 160) +
  ylim(0, 230) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", name = "Density") +
  scale_alpha(range = c(0.15, 0.7), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Bo Bichette 2023 Kernel Density Map",
    subtitle = "Density of balls in play",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
```{r Bo_Bichette_9_Zone_ESDA}
library(dplyr)

# Create 3 x 3 grid using bo_plot coordinates
bo_zones <- bo_plot %>%
  filter(!is.na(spray_x), !is.na(spray_y)) %>%
  mutate(
    x_zone = case_when(
      spray_x <= quantile(spray_x, 1/3, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Left",
      spray_x <= quantile(spray_x, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Center",
      TRUE ~ "Right"
    ),
    y_zone = case_when(
      spray_y <= quantile(spray_y, 1/3, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Shallow",
      spray_y <= quantile(spray_y, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Medium",
      TRUE ~ "Deep"
    ),
    zone_9 = paste(y_zone, x_zone, sep = "_")
  )

# Count observations in each zone
zone_counts_9 <- bo_zones %>%
  count(y_zone, x_zone, zone_9) %>%
  mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
  arrange(
    factor(y_zone, levels = c("Deep", "Medium", "Shallow")),
    factor(x_zone, levels = c("Left", "Center", "Right"))
  )

print(zone_counts_9)

# Chi-square goodness-of-fit test
# Null hypothesis: balls in play are evenly distributed across the 9 zones
chisq_result_9 <- chisq.test(zone_counts_9$n)

print(chisq_result_9)

# Show observed vs expected counts
expected_counts_9 <- data.frame(
  zone_9 = zone_counts_9$zone_9,
  observed = zone_counts_9$n,
  expected = round(chisq_result_9$expected, 2)
)

print(expected_counts_9)
```

The p-value is very low $4*10^{-9}$ we reject the null hypothesis that balls are evenly distriubted across the 9 zones identifying a non-uniform distribution. 

```{r Bo_Bichette_9_Zone_Plot}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Compute tercile breakpoints from bo_plot
x_breaks <- quantile(bo_plot$spray_x, probs = c(1/3, 2/3), na.rm = TRUE)
y_breaks <- quantile(bo_plot$spray_y, probs = c(1/3, 2/3), na.rm = TRUE)

# Label positions for the 9 zones
x_min <- min(bo_plot$spray_x, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(bo_plot$spray_x, na.rm = TRUE)
y_min <- min(bo_plot$spray_y, na.rm = TRUE)
y_max <- max(bo_plot$spray_y, na.rm = TRUE)

label_positions <- data.frame(
  x = c(
    mean(c(x_min, x_breaks[1])),
    mean(c(x_breaks[1], x_breaks[2])),
    mean(c(x_breaks[2], x_max)),
    mean(c(x_min, x_breaks[1])),
    mean(c(x_breaks[1], x_breaks[2])),
    mean(c(x_breaks[2], x_max)),
    mean(c(x_min, x_breaks[1])),
    mean(c(x_breaks[1], x_breaks[2])),
    mean(c(x_breaks[2], x_max))
  ),
  y = c(
    mean(c(y_breaks[2], y_max)),
    mean(c(y_breaks[2], y_max)),
    mean(c(y_breaks[2], y_max)),
    mean(c(y_breaks[1], y_breaks[2])),
    mean(c(y_breaks[1], y_breaks[2])),
    mean(c(y_breaks[1], y_breaks[2])),
    mean(c(y_min, y_breaks[1])),
    mean(c(y_min, y_breaks[1])),
    mean(c(y_min, y_breaks[1]))
  ),
  label = c(
    "Deep Left", "Deep Center", "Deep Right",
    "Medium Left", "Medium Center", "Medium Right",
    "Shallow Left", "Shallow Center", "Shallow Right"
  )
)

ggplot() +
  # field geometry
  geom_path(data = outfield_arc, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_path(data = infield_arc, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = subset(foul_lines, grp == "L"), aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(data = subset(foul_lines, grp == "R"), aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_path(data = home_plate, aes(x = x, y = y), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = bases, aes(x = x, y = y), size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(data = mound, aes(x = x, y = y), size = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  # spray chart points
  geom_point(
    data = bo_plot,
    aes(x = spray_x, y = spray_y, color = result_class),
    alpha = 0.65,
    size = 2
  ) +

  # vertical zone boundaries
  geom_vline(xintercept = x_breaks, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +

  # horizontal zone boundaries
  geom_hline(yintercept = y_breaks, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +

  # labels
  geom_text(
    data = label_positions,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  coord_fixed() +
  xlim(-160, 160) +
  ylim(0, 230) +
  labs(
    title = "Bo Bichette 2023 Spray Chart with 9-Zone Grid",
    subtitle = "Balls in play divided into shallow, medium, and deep thirds across left, center, and right field",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    color = "Result"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
